title: Cauldrons
description: Adds more stuff you can do with cauldrons!
body:
This mod lets you put more things in Cauldrons!

Mojang may have added Lava and Snow Cauldrons, but what about...

- Milk Cauldron
  - When stood in with potion effects, will clear them, emptying the cauldron
- Honey Cauldron
  - When stood in with poison, will cure it, lowering the level by one
- Dragon Breath Cauldron
  - When stood in, damages you
  - Can be right clicked with splash potions to turn them into lingering potions, lowering the level by one
- Experience Cauldron
  - When stood in, will give you experience, lowering the level by one
- Mushroom Stew Cauldron
- Rabbit Stew Cauldron
- Beetroot Soup Cauldron
- Suspicious Stew Cauldron

Potion Cauldrons and Dyed Water Cauldrons are not implemented yet, but are planned.

This mod runs on Fabric.
